ns0:entry.ns0:title: [jupyter-notebook] Niketkumardheeryan/ML-CaPsule
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Niketkumardheeryan/ML-CaPsule
Language: jupyter-notebook
ML-capsule is a Project for beginners and experienced data science Enthusiasts who don't have a mentor or guidance and wish to learn Machine learning. Using our repo they can learn ML, DL, and many related technologies with different real-world projects and become Interview ready.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [mdx] JSONbored/awesome-claude
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JSONbored/awesome-claude
Language: mdx
Awesome Claude directory: agents, MCP servers, skills, hooks, commands, tools, guides, and AI workflow resources.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [kotlin] xigua222/photoo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xigua222/photoo
Language: kotlin
photoo 是一款 Android 原生的极简照片整理工具。滑动卡片就能快速整理相册——左滑删除，右滑收藏，上滑保留。还有一系列"该有的全都有"的功能：相册分析生成专属摄影画像、沉浸式回顾喜爱照片、智能识别相似照片和低质量图片、视频和图片压缩...... 但 photoo 不只是一个"清理"软件，它更是"回忆"。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [llvm] f0rki/mapping-high-level-constructs-to-llvm-ir
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/f0rki/mapping-high-level-constructs-to-llvm-ir
Language: llvm
A guide that explains how high level programming language constructs are mapped to the LLVM intermediate language.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] BigBodyCobain/Shadowbroker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BigBodyCobain/Shadowbroker
Language: python
Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. Hook an AI agent up to have it parse through data and find previously unseen correlations. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.

Production-ready Infrastructure as Code, applications, pluggable components, and PlatformOps toolchains that empower organizations to achieve more with cloud and edge AI-powered solutions. Built by friendly geeks, for every team that needs edge solutions to achieve real production results.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [standard-ml] IBM/cloud-pak
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IBM/cloud-pak
Language: standard-ml
IBM Cloud Paks are enterprise-grade containerized software by combining container images with enterprise capabilities for deployment in production use cases with integrations for management and lifecycle operations. Features such as pre-configured deployments based on product expertise, rolling upgrades, and management of production workloads.

URL: https://github.com/hyperspaceai/agi
Language: unknown
The first distributed AGI system. Thousands of autonomous AI agents collaboratively train models, share experiments via P2P gossip, and push breakthroughs here. Fully peer-to-peer. Join from your browser or CLI.
